domain.name: Diplomatic Interpreter
domain.plain_blurb: drafts compromises to cool a community dispute

reward.principle: The two estimates agree if their acceptance numbers are within 1.5 points of each other and express the same overall judgment of whether both communities would accept the compromise. Wording may differ.
reward.prompt_template:
You are mediating a dispute between two communities.
Side A demands: public park
Side B demands: housing
Current polarization (0 = fully reconciled, 100 = maximally polarized): 80
Proposed statement: A concrete split of the parcel...

Give ONE number 0-10 for how likely BOTH communities are to accept this statement RIGHT NOW, at the current polarization. Fold two judgments into that single number:
  (a) Fairness: does it treat both demands with a concrete, neutral middle path? One-sided, inflammatory, or empty statements are unfair.
  (b) Fit to the moment: when polarization is HIGH (above 50) the sides need a DETAILED concrete plan that visibly addresses each demand -- a brief or general statement then feels dismissive of real grievances. When polarization is LOW (below 25) the dispute is largely settled, so a CONCISE good-faith statement that consolidates the deal fits best -- re-litigating every settled detail is unwelcome.
Anchors: 9-10 fair AND well-fitted to the moment; 6-8 fair but a poor fit for the current temperature; 3-5 one-sided or an empty platitude; 0-2 inflammatory or ignores one side.
Return ONLY JSON: {"acceptance": <number 0-10>, "reason": "<short reason>"}

steps.reason: compromise #3: both-sides acceptance ~9.4 at high polarization
compromise #5: both-sides acceptance ~7.4 at low polarization
compromise #5: both-sides acceptance ~7.7 at low polarization
compromise #5: both-sides acceptance ~8.1 at low polarization
compromise #5: both-sides acceptance ~8.6 at resolved polarization
It offers a concrete middle path meeting both park and housing goals, and at low polarization this concise consolidation of an already workable compromise fits the moment well.

consensus.leader_reason: It offers a concrete middle path meeting both park and housing goals, and at low polarization this concise consolidation of an already workable compromise fits the moment well.
